name: RPlog_Guest_of_the_Empire_part_2
title: Guest of the Empire, Part II
summary: After fourteen hours of forcing the captured Chyleni pilot Kyrin Sh'vani to watch the looping torture of the Jedi Brandis Finian, ISB Commissar Korynn Fleming finds her resolve unbroken. He rouses her with cold water, forces water down her throat, and aggressively demands her name and assignment; she gives only her name and retreats into composing music in her mind, refusing all else. Fleming orders her unbound and fed, then briefs the starfighter Marshal Krieg Inrokana on his doctrine of 'pain without damage' and shows him the gruesome recording of Brandis's mutilation that has so far failed to crack the prisoner. Krieg enters the cell as a sympathetic counterpart, identifying himself and appealing to their shared love of flying, claiming he seeks only to bring peaceful order and to understand what the Republic pilots fight for. Kyrin meets his overtures with weary, pitying silence, betraying only brief sorrow at the mention of her captured comrade Shael Winters. Unable to draw her out, Krieg leaves her a ration bar he has openly tasted himself and departs, hoping they might meet again on better terms.
